name: Lago
description: Monitor Lago open source billing platform for access and subscription data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Lago at https://app.getlago.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Lago Settings → API Keys
